greeting: Come in, come in — quickly now, before the patrol passes. You look like you need a warm meal.
Welcome to the Raven's Rest. The ale is thin but the hearth is warm, and that's more than most have here.
Sit down, dear. You're safe enough in here... for now.
quest: There are families hiding in the cellar — women and children whose husbands spoke against Ashwick. I need supplies smuggled in without the guards noticing. Can you help?
idle: I keep my head down and my doors open. It's all I can do.
The town wasn't always like this. Before Ashwick... well, that was a long time ago.
